title: Whats Your Top 5 Evangelion Fights Moments
display_title: Whats Your Top 5 Evangelion Fights Moments
wikitext:
[]: Whats Your Top 5 Evangelion Fights/Moments             Quote Post by Shakivara777 » Sun Aug 23, 2015 6:34 am Me: 1-Eva Unit 02'&08 VS EVA 13 & 09 From Evangelion Q 2-Asuka Eva 02 vs mass production eva's From EOE 3-Eva unit 00,01,02 Vs 10th Angel from evangelion 2.22 4-Eva 04 Vs ramiel from Pachinko game 5-eva 01 dummy plug vs unit 03 From NGE

[]: Re: Whats Your Top 5 Evangelion Fights/Moments             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Sun Aug 23, 2015 1:48 pm Shakivara777 wrote: 4-Eva 04 Vs ramiel from evangelion 2.22

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Sun Aug 23, 2015 3:05 pm Wasn't there some non-can thing when Kaworu is controlling Unit-04 equipped with a shield and Lance of Longinus? I've seen it on YouTube I swear, but I don't know what it was for. No Order- 3.0 Space Battle 2.0 End Battle w/ Zeruel(Whole thing) Manga Shinji vs MPEs EOE Asuka vs MPEs Shinji vs Kaworu/Unit-02 Edit- Found it!

[]: Re: Whats Your Top 5 Evangelion Fights/Moments             Quote Post by Shakivara777 » Sun Aug 23, 2015 3:34 pm IronEvangelion wrote: Uh... when did Eva 04 ever fight anything? As far as I know it dirac sea'd on activation in both continuities. Anyhow: Asuka VS. MP Evas Ramiel fight in 2.0 Gaghiel fight Eva Mk. 06 descending from the moon in 2.0 The smiling Rei scene at the end of the Ramiel fight

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Sun Aug 23, 2015 4:20 pm That's a non-canon video clip from a Japan-only Evangelion pachinko game, it even says that in the comments. I've seen screenshots from it before. And the Ramiel battle was in 1.11, not 2.22. Also Unit 04 was using the Lance of Longinus there, which is a one-of-a-kind weapon that NERV has locked up in Terminal Dogma (where Lilith is). If Kaworu had access to Lilith that early, he would have just completed his mission and caused Third Impact instead of fighting Ramiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 23, 2015 4:26 pm ^^^ and ^^ That's one of the scenes from an Eva pachinko game. More in this thread -- http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/5952/CR-Evangelion-For-pachinko-not-the-movies/

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Aug 24, 2015 3:46 pm The Pachinko games have a lot of really neat action sequences and what-ifs, like Mari making orbit during Operation US, Unit 05 being under Misato's command in Tokyo 3 and fighting the 4th-9th Angels, and I've seen one from Q with Unit 02' fighting the 12th Angel in some kind of rocky desert. My favorites are definitely the bonus sequences with the Mark.06. It one-shots every Angel with the Spear of Cassius, but that's still more screen time than it had in the movies and it looks cool as heck doing it! But for my top 5 favorite moments from the canon stuff: 1. Shinji/Asuka/Rei vs. Rebuild Sahaquiel. Fate plays a big role in this. 2. Shinji & Asuka vs. Israfel 3. Unit 01's Awakening - both versions for different reasons 4. Asuka vs. Clockiel 5. Asuka/Mari vs. Eva 13 and 09. Again, music plays a big part in this. It Will Mean Victory is a spectacular song Special mention: The Wunder's assault on Eva 13

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Aug 24, 2015 4:02 pm IronEvangelion wrote: That's a non-canon video clip from a Japan-only Evangelion pachinko game, it even says that in the comments. I've seen screenshots from it before. And the Ramiel battle was in 1.11, not 2.22. Also Unit 04 was using the Lance of Longinus there, which is a one-of-a-kind weapon that NERV has locked up in Terminal Dogma (where Lilith is). If Kaworu had access to Lilith that early, he would have just completed his mission and caused Third Impact instead of fighting Ramiel.

[]:             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Mon Aug 24, 2015 6:54 pm Bagheera wrote: Not necessarily true in the setting of the new movies. We have no idea what his mission, if any, was there.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Aug 24, 2015 9:23 pm They definitely present him as s more heroic character in these games. Check this out: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wEtdxayJ4wY

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Aug 24, 2015 9:36 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: They definitely present him as s more heroic character in these games. Check this out: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wEtdxayJ4wY

[]: I SAW NOTHING! BD             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Mon Aug 24, 2015 11:29 pm *I'm not reading this, I'm not reading this.* SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 25, 2015 12:56 am I was thinking of actually explaining why these are my top five, but then I realized that I would ramble on too long and the post would never happen. - #02: Eva-01 vs. Sachiel - #18: Eva-01 vs. Eva-03/Bardiel [2.22 version is fine, too] - #19: Eva-01 vs. Zeruel - #24: "Ode to Joy" sequence - #25': Team Soryu vs. Harpy Bitches (II Air & Munashiki Nagare) I'm sticking to original series on account of these scenes having affected me fifteen years ago when I was still moderately young and impressionable. This shit is planted deep in my psyche, yo. The new movies have some impressive sequences, but they will never captivate me on the same level, never touch me as deeply.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Aug 25, 2015 1:06 am I was gonna write a list for this thread, but I realized that: 1. I don't do lists. (Not even favorite movie lists.) 2. This list doesn't count. 3. All 5 spots would be taken up by the Zerul/10th NTE Angel battle anyway, because the awesomeness of that battle consumes me every time I think of Eva battles in general. 4. The tones, moods, and themes in Eva battles are way too eclectic in order for me to not think that I'm comparing apples to oranges every time I select more than one Eva battle to think about. 5. Asuka's Final Battle would be in that list somewhere if I were to write it despite the entire list being consumed by Zerul/10th NTE Angel battle, simply because Asuka fighting giant, monstrous, hollowed-out humanoids being manipulated by the remnants of Kaworu's deceased conciseness is way too fucked up to not list somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Aug 25, 2015 4:38 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: 1. I don't do lists. (Not even favorite movie lists.)

[]:             Quote Post by ChaudSept » Wed Aug 26, 2015 6:09 pm Every moment in 2.0 pretty much - The rush of the 3 Evas to catch Sahaquiel/8th, because Destiny ffs. - When DummyEva-01 rekts the third one with Asuka in it. Because this scene mixed with Kyou no hi wa sayounara makes me emotional. - The arrival of the 10th/Zeruel, because In my spirit is the best them ever. Rei running towards it is also pretty good. - Shinji saving Rei, because Tsubasa wo kudasai makes me so damn emotional. - The final scene of EoE (kinda final I guess), because Komm susser tod is a masterpiece. And it makes me emotional. And nope, the soundtrack doesn't influence how I appreciate a show.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:48 pm Sicarius VI wrote: But... But you just made one.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 27, 2015 2:17 pm ChaudSept wrote: Every moment in 2.0 pretty much

[]:             Quote Post by ChaudSept » Thu Aug 27, 2015 5:23 pm Reichu wrote: Some of those didn't involve fighting.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Aug 27, 2015 5:43 pm ChaudSept wrote: But moments do count! OP said it.
